description_long: This is a small pedestrian bridge constructed primarily from wood, featuring a flat deck supported by a visible lattice of wooden beams and posts beneath. The bridge has simple, upright wooden railings on both sides, with horizontal and vertical slats providing safety and structure. The deck is composed of closely spaced wooden planks, and the support structure underneath is a grid-like truss system, giving the bridge a rustic and utilitarian appearance. The ends of the bridge are slightly raised, with short stairways leading up to the deck. There are no visible decorative elements or lighting fixtures, emphasizing a functional and straightforward design. The overall color is a natural, light brown wood tone, consistent throughout the structure.
description: A small, rustic wooden pedestrian bridge with simple railings and a visible truss support structure beneath. The bridge features a flat plank deck and short stairways at each end.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the bridge, the wooden railings, and the lattice truss support structure beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bridge, the flat deck, and the stairway at the end.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, showing the opposite side of the bridge with the same railing and support structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the length of the bridge and the stairway at the other end.
attribute_railing_design: wooden posts with horizontal and vertical slats, simple rectangular profile
